examples: Farther north, Southern Montana Electric Generation and Transmission Co-operative says "regulatory uncertainties" have forced it to defer plans for its 250mw Highwood coal plant near Great Falls.
Detectives are investigating but said the cause of the fire at Stroud School in Highwood Lane was not yet known.
"The closure of Highwood Road to general traffic is a key part of achieving this, " a South Gloucestershire Council spokesman said.
Plans to turn Highwood Road into a "linear park" with green spaces and bus and cycle lanes were originally agreed in 2002.
